final:
module RefModule(
  input clk,
  input rst,
  input enable,
  output reg [3:0] out
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
      out <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
      if (out == 4'b1111) begin
        out <= 4'b0000;
      end else begin
        out <= out + 1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
